description: Lighting configuration for Transpersonal Game Studio — Cretaceous Survival Game

directional_light.label: Sun_Primary_001
directional_light.notes: Warm midday Cretaceous sun. Pitch guard enforced: must be <= -30 degrees.

sky_atmosphere.label: SkyAtmosphere_001
sky_atmosphere.notes: Single SkyAtmosphere. Duplicates are destroyed on CAP enforcement.

sky_light.label: SkyLight_001
sky_light.notes: Real-time capture essential for Lumen sky contribution.

exponential_height_fog.label: Fog_Primary_001
exponential_height_fog.notes: Light atmospheric haze for depth. Volumetric fog for light shaft interaction.

volumetric_cloud.label: VolumetricCloud_001
volumetric_cloud.notes: Spawned if not present. Provides realistic cloud coverage for Cretaceous sky.

canopy_rect_light.label: Light_HubCanopy_001
canopy_rect_light.notes: Simulates warm sunlight filtering through jungle canopy at the main hub clearing.

jungle_ambience_primary.name: AMBTrop_Daytime tropical forest_Tim Kahn_MKH80208030st
jungle_ambience_primary.description: Late morning Panamanian rainforest — insects, birds, water drops on leaves
jungle_ambience_primary.usage: Primary ambient loop for hub clearing (X=2100, Y=2400)

jungle_ambience_secondary.name: denseforestwithbirds
jungle_ambience_secondary.description: Dense forest with birds — Goa, India field recording
jungle_ambience_secondary.usage: Secondary ambient layer for dense vegetation zones

visual_direction.key_principle: Light does not illuminate — light signifies. The player must feel the heat and danger of the prehistoric sun.

color_palette.sky: Deep azure with white volumetric clouds
color_palette.fog: Pale blue atmospheric haze for depth

hub_composition.description: Sunlit jungle clearing — the single PlayerStart. Dense vegetation surrounds a bright open space. Dinosaurs visible at clearing edge. Warm light shafts through canopy. Ancient stone ruins partially buried in undergrowth.

cap_enforcement_rules.notes: Server guard enforces 10000-lux floor. Never fight it with low values.
